<!--
If your bug is with syntax highlighting- that is client side, so it's as simple as making small reproducer.

For cosmetic issues like syntax, please include both a code snippet and a screenshot showing the issue.

For more complex issues, please try to make a small reproducer that's very specific, with steps all the way from opening the workspace to seeing the issue.

Include the relevant logs as well. Server side logs are in output > slang-server on vscode, and client side logs are in output > Slang.

If you think it may involve file path or OS issues, please indicate the OS you're using.
-->
